General.Name: Longfor Properties Co Ltd
General.Description: Longfor Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development, commercial investment, asset management, property management, and smart construction businesses in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in three segments: Property Development, Investment Property Operation, and Property Service. The Property Development segment develops and sells office and commercial premises, and residential properties. The Investment Property Operation segment leases investment properties, including shopping malls and rental housing. The Property Service segment provides property management and related services. It also owns hotel properties. The company was formerly known as Longfor Properties Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Longfor Group Holdings Limited in June 2018. Longfor Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
